coreIssue: This 1:1 is likely about whether a junior Product Designer three months in has enough clarity and support to work confidently amid shifting requirements.
openingQuestion: What feels hardest to navigate in your work right now when priorities or requirements shift?
listenFor: whether he names a specific recent project or decision where the bar for good work felt unclear
whether he pauses, hedges, or stays general when asked who he goes to for help
whether he describes current priorities with a clear tradeoff or lists everything as equally urgent
avoid: do not turn this exploratory 1:1 into a performance readout or reassurance speech
do not solve the process immediately before you hear where the team setup is creating friction for a junior designer
goodOutcome: You and Kenji have agreed one concrete way a junior Product Designer will get clearer priorities or earlier support this week when requirements change.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent example of shifting requirements and use it only to ground the conversation if he struggles to name a moment.
